response: the sacred verses of siriaragoo mahala 3 emphasize the importance of spiritual devotion and the grace of the guru - the path of devotion is only possible through the grace of the guru - without the guidance of the guru devotion cannot be achieved - the spirit must be united with the self to attain purity - the true word of the divine is the path to salvation - gene is not the key to spiritual awakening - language is a tool to convey the divine message - the spirit must be awakened through the sacred word - visit the guru to receive the divine wisdom - the soul must be united with the divine to find true peace - the spirit must be cleansed through devotion - the divine is the true friend and guide - the spirit must be nurtured through the sacred teachings - the path of devotion is the way to spiritual enlightenment - the language of the divine is the sacred word - the spirit must be awakened through the grace of the guru - the visit to the guru is the way to spiritual growth - the spirit must be united with the divine to find true peace - the language of the sacred is the path to salvation - the gene of devotion is passed through the sacred teachings - the spirit must be cleansed through the divine word - the visit to the guru is the way to spiritual awakening - the language of the divine is the path to salvation - the spirit must be united with the divine to find true peace - the gene of devotion is passed through the sacred teachings - the spirit must be awakened through the grace of the guru - the visit to the guru is the way to spiritual growth - the language of the sacred is the path to salvation - the spirit must be united with the divine to find true peace - the gene of devotion is passed through the sacred teachings - the spirit must be awakened through the grace of the guru - the visit to the guru is the way to spiritual growth - the language of the sacred is the path to salvation - the spirit must be united with the divine to find true peace - the gene of devotion is passed through the sacred teachings - the spirit must be awakened through the grace of the guru - the visit to the guru is the way to spiritual growth - the language of the sacred is the path to salvation - the spirit must be united with the divine to find true peace - the gene of devotion is passed through the sacred teachings - the spirit must be awakened through the grace of the guru - the visit to the guru is the way to spiritual growth - the language of the sacred is the path to salvation - the spirit must be united with the divine
